2025 Birthday
A birthday reflection

A Letter to
My Next Chapter

Phionah Nagaba  ·  Wishes · Prayers · Opportunities

From Phionah
“Your words may become part of the lessons I carry.”

Dear Friend,

As I celebrate another year of life, I find myself reflecting on how far God has brought me, the people who have shaped my journey, and the person I am still becoming.

This form is my way of inviting you into that reflection. I would love to hear your birthday wishes, prayers, advice, Bible verses, opportunities, and honest feedback — anything you believe could help me grow into a better leader, daughter, friend, entrepreneur, and servant of my community.

Feel free to answer only the questions you are comfortable with. You may also remain anonymous.

Thank you for walking this journey with me.

With gratitude,
Phionah Nagaba

Serving the community

Rooted in purpose

Your reflection

this gift.

Thank you for being part of her story.

— Phionah Nagaba
